name: Periodicity - Hats and scars
short_description: Survive against hordes of monsters. Equip different weapons with unique abilities. Forage for materials to rebuild a destroyed town. Upgrade your gear for maximum damage.
detailed_description:
Survive as long as you can in a harsh world full of monsters

There are over 70 unique monsters that all want to cut your life short. Make sure you avoid their attacks and get them before they get you.

Equip different weapons with unique abilities

Choose from 12 different weapons, each with different attacks. Use ranged, midrange and melee weapons. Combine attacks for maximum damage.

Forage for materials to rebuild a destroyed town

Each level has items for you to collect. Use different tools to gather the ones you need to rebuild the town and buy upgrades.

Upgrade your gear for maximum damage

The merchants in town will sell you upgrades to increase your chances against the monsters.Each merchant has unique upgrades and trade options.

Story:

You get to a village that has been destroyed. Rebuild the village to attract different merchants and make survival easier. Gather materials while surviving against hordes of monsters. Find out what destroyed the village, because it might happen again.

Periodicity - Hats and scars is a fast paced bullet heaven, auto shooter, horde herder game set in the wild west. Prepare for the fight in a small village. Venture into the woods, a quarry and other places to battle against hordes of monsters, bandits and unknown horrors. Beat big boss monster in every level, get loot, buy permanent upgrades and do it again. All while wearing a cool hat.

 

Features:

  • Rebuild the village with materials from different levels.

  • Get permanent upgrades from merchants.

  • Use different weapons fitting your play style.

  • Get a high score in each of the 4 areas.

  • Beat the Boss Rush Arena.

  • Find all the Hats.

  • Uncover secrets.
